entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for drought tolerance.

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A trait associated with tolerance to terminal drought stress in sorghum.

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress occurring at the end of the growing season.

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain productivity under terminal drought stress.

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci associated with a specific trait.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED POPULATIONS
entities.description: Genetic populations developed from crosses used for mapping QTLs.

entities.name: IS9830
entities.description: A sorghum parental line used in the development of RIP 1.

entities.name: E36-1
entities.description: A sorghum parental line of Ethiopian origin and source of the stay-green trait.

entities.name: N13
entities.description: A sorghum parental line used in the development of RIP 2.

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country of origin for the parental line E36-1.

entities.name: AFLP
entities.description: Amplified Fragment Length Polymorphism markers used in genetic mapping.

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism markers used in genetic mapping.

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used in genetic mapping.

entities.name: RAPD
entities.description: Random Amplified Polymorphic DNA markers used in genetic mapping.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location in India where the populations were evaluated.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research evaluations were conducted.

entities.name: GREEN LEAF AREA PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A quantitative measure used to evaluate the stay-green trait.

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: A statistical method used to detect QTLs.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The productivity of the crop in terms of grain yield.

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of grain yield performance across different environments.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED TRANSFER
entities.description: A breeding technique used to transfer specific traits into elite materials using markers.
